title: Pick-BlockState
description: Pick-blocking now copies the blockstate if the block isn't a block entity
body:
### Why no more updates? Mojang decided to change how pick-blocking works, and I haven't been able to get it working under the new system.
**For a more advance version look at [Pick Block Pro](https://modrinth.com/mod/pick-block-pro) by [Sjouwer](https://modrinth.com/user/sjouwer)!**
In vanilla, you can pick-block (default Middle-Click). If you in creative mode and hold Ctrl while you pick-block a [Block Entity](https://minecraft.gamepedia.com/Block_entity) (Chests, Hoppers, Droppers, Furnaces, Campfires, etc.) you get an item with the data associated with it (like what's in a chest). With this mod, if the block you ctrl + pick-block isn't a [Block Entity](https://minecraft.gamepedia.com/Block_entity) then it will copy it's [block state](https://minecraft.gamepedia.com/Block_states) (the direction it's facing, if a redstone powered device is on/off, if a campfire is lit, if a block is water logged, etc). For example stairs: If you ctrl + pick-block an upside down, west facing stair, then no matter which way you're facing, it'll always be upside down, facing west.
